the mask is wis not int, i currently use it and i can say for a fact it IS wis for all you ppl trying to confuse others P

# Jul 30 2002 at 4:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361916697
19 posts
Just bought one of these on Drinal for 375pp in the Bazaar. This new Bazaar is KILLING prices. Everyone is trying to undercut the next guy. A total buyers market ! :)

P.S.- Mine had 4 Wis on it not 4 Int as is being reported here

# May 02 2002 at 6:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780175686
10 posts
Mabye there's two versions. Had this drop for my cleric yesterday, it was wis not int. Dropped off the Seb Gaurdian of all things, group was surprised that is wasn't Larri Mask since he had no Lammy visible.

Bizarre
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 1:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966162592
25 posts
it seems that now it's a +4 Intelligence.

a guy showed me this mask and it was +4 int.

and i looked 3 times to this mask so i am sure
it was 4 Int and not 4 Wis.

looks great for an enchanter.

QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2001 at 9:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762563698
41 posts
I just bought this mask for 279pp... I realized I couldn't use it right before I bought it, but though id sell it again for a much better price so I hit trade anyway, so the other person wouldnt be disappointed =)

Its got pretty damn cool stats thought it could replace my... no-mask-at-all wich I got yesterday =) But was I wrong? O'yeah.


Zenofex Stormcaller,
Ranger on Erollisi Marr
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2001 at 2:58 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Bought one of these for my shaman (Terris Thule), really wanted to replace the Velium Ruby Veil I have been wearing because of the veil's lack of AC. The guy who was selling it told me that the normal price was 5k but he was willing to sell it for 3.5k because he "needed the money". I got it for 2k. Not sure if I got a good price for it but I'm definitely happy with it.
